allow: Bash(clang -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -std=c11 -I. -g -O0 -fsanitize=address -o test_runner_asan tests/test_main.c tests/test_nvic.c tests/test_memory.c tests/test_bus.c tests/test_timer.c tests/test_systick.c tests/test_uart.c tests/test_core.c tests/test_debugger.c tests/test_integration.c core/core.c nvic/nvic.c memory/memory.c bus/bus.c events/event_queue.c peripherals/timer/timer.c peripherals/systick/systick.c peripherals/uart/uart.c peripherals/uart/uart_logger.c debugger/debugger.c simulator/simulator.c ui/ui.c gdb_stub/gdb_stub.c)

Bash(clang -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 -I. -g -O0 -fsanitize=address profiler.c core/core.c nvic/nvic.c nvic/nvic_bus.c memory/memory.c bus/bus.c events/event_queue.c peripherals/timer/timer.c peripherals/systick/systick.c peripherals/rcc/rcc.c peripherals/gpio/gpio.c peripherals/uart/uart.c peripherals/uart/uart_logger.c debugger/debugger.c simulator/simulator.c ui/ui.c gdb_stub/gdb_stub.c main.c -o stm32sim_asan)

Bash(clang -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 -I src -g -O0 -fsanitize=address src/profiler.c src/core/core.c src/nvic/nvic.c src/nvic/nvic_bus.c src/memory/memory.c src/bus/bus.c src/events/event_queue.c src/peripherals/timer/timer.c src/peripherals/systick/systick.c src/peripherals/rcc/rcc.c src/peripherals/gpio/gpio.c src/peripherals/uart/uart.c src/peripherals/uart/uart_logger.c src/debugger/debugger.c src/simulator/simulator.c src/ui/ui.c src/gdb_stub/gdb_stub.c src/main.c -o /tmp/stm32sim_asan)
